ocr: COMBINE almond flour, baking powder and salt together in a large bowl. Set aside.
In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar substitute in a large bowl until creamy.
Add in egg and mix to combine.
Add the dry ingredients slowly into the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Roll the cookie dough into 1-inch balls and place on a parchment lined baking sheet.
Balls will slightly flatten but will not spread like traditional cookies.
Remove from baking sheet after 2 minutes then transfer to a wire rack to cool.
